name: DoIP_GetControlTimeout, DoIP_SetControlTimeout
title: DoIP_GetControlTimeout, DoIP_SetControlTimeout
description: Sets or returns the timeout for Vehicle Identification Requests, connect and routing activation (in milliseconds).

parameters.name: toControl_ms
parameters.description: Timeout for Vehicle Identification Requests, connect and routing activation [ms]

return: Form 1: —Form 2: Timeout for Vehicle Identification Requests, connect and routing activation [ms]
